intro.lead: Two days designed to deliver actionable value. No lectures, no filler — asset-class experts, debate panels and curated relationship-building spaces.

day1.label: Day 1 — Context, strategy and specialization
day1.tagline: Read the world, understand wealth, specialize by asset.

items.title: LinkU Ventures opening
items.speaker: LinkU Ventures team
items.desc: Welcome, summit thesis and roadmap of the two days.

items.title: Geopolitics and the Colombia–Venezuela opportunity
items.speaker: Juliana [last name TBC] — former Vice President of ProColombia
items.desc: Venezuela reopening, regional reconfiguration, sectors with the biggest upside and real risks of the transition. How Colombia positions itself in this new window.

items.title: Global macroeconomic context and its impact on LatAm
items.speaker: Daniel Belandia (TBC)
items.desc: Rates, dollar, inflation, 2026–2027 scenarios and the read for the Latin American investor.

items.title: Family Offices: how elite wealth invests
items.speaker: 4 panelists + moderator
items.desc: Wealth manager for artists · Wealth manager for footballers · Traditional multifamily office · UHNW single family office. Honest conversation about real allocation, opportunities and challenges.

items.title: Wealth Management & Strategic Asset Allocation
items.speaker: 3 speakers + moderator
items.desc: How to build and rebalance a multi-asset portfolio today, which assets to over or underweight, and wealth decision frameworks.

items.title: Cross-border wealth structuring
items.speaker: Speaker TBC
items.desc: Jurisdictions, vehicles, succession planning and compliance in an environment of greater fiscal transparency.

items.title: Specialized tracks — pick yours
items.desc: Running in parallel for 2 hours. 2 ~40-min talks with asset-class experts plus Q&A.

items.title: Elevator Pitches — projects by asset class
items.desc: Fast format: 5–7 minutes per project, split by category (VC, FI/Equities, alternatives, real estate, crypto). Investors in the room and directed networking.

items.title: Networking cocktail
items.desc: Live music. Dress code business casual.

day2.label: Day 2 — Inspiration and relationship-building
day2.tagline: Fuel the audience with vision and open the space to do business.

items.title: Welcome coffee
items.desc: Reception and 1:1 agenda activation for the day.

items.title: Inspirational talk · I
items.speaker: High-profile speaker — TBC
items.desc: Long-term vision, legacy and purpose of capital.

items.title: Inspirational talk · II
items.speaker: Success story or reference figure — TBC
items.desc: Emotional connection with the wealth audience.

items.title: Relationship-building block
items.desc: Running in parallel, with agendas coordinated through the summit app.

items.title: LinkU Ventures closing
items.speaker: LinkU Ventures team
items.desc: Summit synthesis, takeaways and next steps.

items.title: Closing lunch
items.desc: Mixed tables, closing with main speakers.
